subcodes.title: Du’a’ a’l-Vajib
subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee, by Thy Divinity which transcendeth all things in its inaccessible heights, to aid every soul that believeth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. سبحانک اللهم لاسالنک بالوهیتک التی انها هی ممتنعة فوق کل شیء ان تنصرن کل ذات الف یؤمن
subcodes.subjects: @He Whom God Shall Make Manifest; the Bab and Baha'u'llah, @the Bayan, its laws and their abrogation, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prophecy and fulfillment, @transcendence; unknowability of God
